verses.1: MISAORA an' i Jehovah fa tsara Izy; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.2: Misaora ny Andriamanitry ny andriamanitra, fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.3: Misaora ny Tompon' ny tompo, fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.4: Izy irery no manao fahagagana lehibe; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.5: Izay nanao ny lanitra tamin' ny fahendrena; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.6: Izay namelatra ny tany ho ambonin' ny rano; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.7: Izay nanao ny fanazavana lehibe; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.8: Ny masoandro hanapaka ny andro; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.9: Ny volana sy ny kintana hanapaka ny alina; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.10: Izay namely an' i Egypta tamin' ny voalohan-terany; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.11: Ka nitondra ny Isiraely nivoaka avy tao aminy; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.12: Tamin' ny tanana mahery sy ny sandry nahinjitra; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.13: Izay nampisaraka ny Ranomasina Mena; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.14: Ka nampandeha ny Isiraely namaky teo afovoany; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.15: Fa nanary an' i Farao sy ny miaramilany tao anatin' ny Ranomasina Mena; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.16: Izay nitarika ny olony nitety ny efitra; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.17: Izay namely mpanjaka lehibe; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.18: Ary nahafaty mpanjaka malaza; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony:
verses.19: Sihona, mpanjakan' ny Amorita; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.20: Sy Oga, mpanjakan' i Basana; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.21: Ary ny tanin' ireo nomeny ho lova; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.22: Dia ho lovan' ny Isiraely mpanompony; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.23: Izay nahatsiaro antsika tamin' ny fahambaniantsika; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.24: Ka nanavotra antsika ho afaka amin' ny fahavalontsika; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.25: Izay manome hanina ny nofo rehetra; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
verses.26: Misaora an' Andriamanitry ny lanitra; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
